emails.subject: EOL-Marathon Ashland Petrolleum
emails.body: EOL-Marathon Ashland Petrolleum Andrea Hauser w/EnronOnline called and said that Marathon has a problem with the terms of the online GTC's (default language) for LPG, petrochems, and refined products and would like to talk to one of our lawyers. Marathon's lawyer is Rhonda Stinemyer and her is 713/296-2408. Can you let Andrea know who will be handling this. Thanks.

emails.subject: EOL-Marathon Ashland Petrolleum

Marathon's lawyer is Rhonda Stinemyer and her is 713/296-2408. Can you let Andrea know who will be handling this. Thanks.

emails.subject: Re: EOL-Marathon Ashland Petrolleum
emails.body: Re: EOL-Marathon Ashland Petrolleum Tana: This would be handled by someone in Alan's group. Jeff Tana Jones 09/08/2000 09:43 AM
